title: Bounce Button

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Bounce Button Animation
description: Create a button that bounces up and down when hovered.
requirements
Use HTML for structure, CSS for styling and JavaScript for functionality.
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Implement the bounce animation when the button is hovered.
Ensure the button is centered on the page.

constraints: The button must bounce up and down when hovered.
The bounce animation must be smooth and natural-looking.
The button must be centered on the page.
The code must be well-organized and easy to read.

gradingCriteria.description: Button bounces up and down when hovered
Button is centered on the page
Code is well-organized and easy to read
Bounce animation is smooth and natural-looking
